      "text": "Atkaſt notikke ta KUN-

tja:
"

    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu tad ak Zilweka Behrns!
etimmes wenn Galdu/ un rak-
ti us to preeksch Juhda/ un

vinnu Beedreem. Un nem ween-
in zittu Galdu/ un raksti us to
preeksch Jahsepa to Galdu Ee-
vräim/ un wiffa Israëta Nam-
na winna Beedru.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad falcez weenu pee-
htra par weenu Galdu/ ka tee
veennadi tohp tawa Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tawu Lauschu
Behrni us tew runnahs un faz-
ihs: Ne gribbi tu mums stah-
tiht/ lahdas fchihs Leetas irr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runna us teem: Ta-
fakka tas KUNas KUNGS:
Reds'/ Es neimſchu Jahsepa
Galdu/ kas Gewräima Rohká
ijis irr/ un to Zilſchu Israëta
vinna Beedru/un fallſchu tohs
r to Galdu no Juhda/ un dar-
ritchu tohs par weenu weenigu
Galdu/ un tee taps par weenu
manná Rohká.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lai tad tee Galdi/ us kur-
eem tu buhsi rakstijs/ tawa
Rohká irr preeksch winnu Az-
um.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu runna us teem:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta takka tas Klingß KUNgs:
Reds'/ Es atweddischn tohs I-
ſraëta Behrnuß no to Pagaxu
Widdus/ karp tee irr aigahju-
ſchi/ un fapulzinaschn tohs no
wiſsapkahrt/ un weddischu tohs
winnu Semmê.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es darrischu tohs par
weenu weenigu Tantu tai Sem-
mê/ us Israëta Kalneem / un
teem buhs wiſſeim weens wee-
nigs Kehniasch par Kehnizu.
Un tee ne buhs wairs divi Tau-
tag/ nedß diwejas Walſitbäs
wairs dalliti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ne jagahnifees
wairs ar jaweim Suhdu-Dee-
weim/ un ar jawahm Negan-
tibahm/ un ar jawahm Pahr-
kahpschanabm. Es atpestischu
tohs no wiſſahm winnu Mah-
jas-Weetahm/ eekſch ka tee irr
apgrehkojuichees/ un es schkilſti-
schu tohs/ tad tee buhs man par
Faudim/ un es buhschu teem par
Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un mans Kalps Dah-
wids buhs par Kehnizu pahr
teem / un teem buhs wiſſeem
weens weenigs Gans/ un tee
staigahs mannás Teefäs / un
fargahs mannus Lifkunus/ un
darrihs pehz teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee dsihwohßtai Sem-
mê/ ko es mannam Kalpam Jeh-

juhtu Tehwt irr dsihwojirscht.
Teefchan/ tee eekſch tahs dsih-
wohs lihds ar jaween Behrneem
un Behrnu Behrneem muhschi-
Oq z
